scenario.key_phrase: My parents want me to start immediately

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Namaste! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Suresh?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes this is Suresh. I had filled a form on your website.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Thank you for showing interest in PW. Suresh, which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in class 12th right now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! And which entrance exam are you preparing for - JEE or NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Advanced. I want to get into IIT.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent choice! JEE Advanced ke liye kitna time hai aapke paas? When is your exam?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: About 5 months left. January mein JEE Main hai, then Advanced in May.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Theek hai, so you need intensive preparation. Are you currently taking coaching somewhere or self-studying?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I was in local coaching but it's not very good. That's why looking for online options.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand. For JEE Advanced in 5 months, I would recommend our JEE Lakshya 2027 course. It has intensive revision, mock tests, and doubt clearing sessions. Have you heard about it?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, can you tell me more about what's included in this course?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! JEE Lakshya includes live classes by Alakh Sir and top faculty, recorded lectures for revision, daily practice problems, weekly mock tests, and 24/7 doubt support. It's specifically designed for serious JEE aspirants.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds good. What about the price? My parents want to know the cost.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: The JEE Lakshya 2027 course is ₹35,999. But we offer 0% EMI through PW Pay - just ₹3,499 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai! Are your parents available to discuss?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, my father is here. Papa wants to ask something. *background voice* Papa is asking about the success rate and faculty quality.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Please tell uncle that PW has produced thousands of IIT selections. Our faculty includes IIT graduates and Alakh Sir himself teaches Physics. We have 95% student satisfaction rate. Would uncle like to speak directly?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: He's saying the price seems reasonable for IIT preparation. But he wants to know if there's any guarantee or refund policy.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! We have a 7-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied. Plus, our track record speaks for itself. Many students from Varanasi have cracked JEE through PW courses. Are you convinced about starting?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, it looks good. My parents want me to start immediately since time is less. How do we proceed?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I can enroll you right now. You'll get immediate access to all course materials. I'll send you the payment link via WhatsApp. You can choose full payment or EMI option. Shall I proceed?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes please. Send the link. We'll go with the EMI option for now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent decision Suresh! I'm sending the enrollment link now. Welcome to the PW family! You'll receive course access within 2 hours. Any other questions before we finish?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, I think we're good. Thank you Priya. Looking forward to starting the preparation.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Thank you Suresh! Best of luck for your IIT journey. Feel free to call if you need any help. Have a great day!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much! Bye.
